title: Web of Lies
subTitle: Retiree Alex Strategos is consumed by loneliness. He turns to internet dating and finds 69-year-old Melissa, but is soon struck by a rush of unexplained illnesses.

title: Betrayed
subTitle: After getting a divorce, Janet celebrates her freedom with a girls' night. When she's found dead, it takes the police 35 years to bring her murder to justice.

title: Blood Relatives
subTitle: One family in a small town in the Pacific Northwest seems to have it all, until a secret video and a stash of guns reveals the face of a diabolical killer.

title: Haunted Towns
subTitle: The team head to the Old Idaho State Penitentiary. Here, they hope to encounter the spirits of two infamous murderers who are rumoured to haunt the building.

title: True Conviction
subTitle: Single mother Donna Willard answers the door to a hooded gunman who shoots and kills her, while her 12-year-son watches from the top of the stairs. Anna-Sigga Nicolazzi revisits the crime and reveals how justice was won for the Willard family.

title: Evil Lives Here
subTitle: Dennis Ryan grows up believing his father's violent teachings will prepare him to save the lives of everyone in their farmhouse, then the teenager discovers the horrible truth.

title: True Conviction
subTitle: Single mother Donna Willard answers the door to a hooded gunman who shoots and kills her, while her 12-year-son watches from the top of the stairs. Anna-Sigga Nicolazzi revisits the crime and reveals how justice was won for the Willard family.

title: Shattered
subTitle: In 2006, residents in Indianapolis called 911 to report gunfire coming from a house. Police find a total of seven bodies in a terrible mass shooting.

title: Betrayed
subTitle: A retired corrections officer thinks he's lived through the riskiest years of his life, but handling his second wife and her jealous ex-husband proves far more deadly.

title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?
subTitle: Ryan is climbing the career ladder and all he needs for a perfect life is the perfect woman to share it with. But is the beautiful Jodi as impeccable as she seems?

title: Web of Lies
subTitle: Beverly Carter is a 50-year-old internet savvy real-estate agent. But when she goes to meet a prospective buyer at a remote house, she never returns.

title: Blood Relatives
subTitle: In Alabama, murder is on the menu at a party after one family's distrust and finger pointing lead detectives on a cross-country search for a killer.

title: The Perfect Murder
subTitle: Peter Theriault has not missed a day of work in almost 30 years. So, when he fails to arrive for his shift at a car plant, friends and family immediately suspect something is very wrong.

title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?
subTitle: Andie Nash is devastated when the man she has been dating, Simon Reid, vanishes mysteriously and she starts to get suspicious.

title: Redrum
subTitle: Tyrannised by his father and traumatised by his sexually abusive scout master Heath takes a gun to his family; will more violence follow this massacre?

title: The Murder Tapes
subTitle: Tempers flare outside a home where Savannah police officers discover three bodies; one argument may offer a vital lead in the case.

title: Shattered
subTitle: In 2001, a man's visit home turns into a desperate search for his missing father. A detective uncovers a murder with a stunning revelation about a group of children and a woman struggles to believe her son could be involved in a vicious crime.

title: Evil Lives Here
subTitle: When Debra Davis' husband excoriates her for refusing to experiment sexually, she thought there was something wrong with her, never suspecting her husband's perversions are signs of something evil deep inside him.

title: Disappeared
subTitle: Former basketball star Rico Harris mysteriously vanishes while driving to Seattle. Investigators start a journey that becomes more baffling as time passes.

title: Ghost Asylum
subTitle: The Tennessee Wraith Chasers travel to the heart of Ohio to investigate the most haunted prison in America - Mansfield Reformatory.

title: Haunted Towns
subTitle: The team head to the Old Idaho State Penitentiary. Here, they hope to encounter the spirits of two infamous murderers who are rumoured to haunt the building.

title: The Curious Case of Natalia Grace
subTitle: Michael's trial is at hand, and he must face the consequences of his actions toward Natalia as Kristine's trial looms.

title: Body Cam
subTitle: An armed suspect fires at police before embarking on a dangerous pursuit; a man locks himself in his garage, but it catches fire, and police don't know if they're on a rescue mission or victims of an ambush.

title: Deadly Influence: The Social Media Murders
subTitle: Anime-obsessed teenager Bianca becomes an inspiring mental health advocate online and changes lives. But on forums and social media accounts, she discovers a horrifying and violent underbelly: young men primed to threaten, harm, and attack.

title: Evil Lives Here
subTitle: Brooke was raised believing Kevin was her father. Her mother kept the truth a secret, not realising that Kevin had far deadlier secrets of his own.

title: The Murder Tapes
subTitle: Robert Sharp is a retired professor living in Michigan. When he is found brutally murdered with the body burned, people are shocked at the violent death and police wonder who could be responsible.

title: Ghost Adventures
subTitle: Three ghost hunters, armed with night-vision cameras and other equipment, tour the United States in order to investigate and document paranormal entities hiding in a range of haunted buildings.

title: Ghost Adventures
subTitle: The crew gains access to a historic LA hospital to expose a demonic entity. This malevolent presence is a force to be reckoned with.

title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
subTitle: Go inside prison walls to interview evil itself. Relatives of killers, along with killers themselves, tell their chilling tales. Questions these killers have never been asked before result in powerful, unsettling and contentious encounters.

title: The Murder Tapes
subTitle: Lansing Police officers find Donovan Barfield's body riddled with bullets and his flat ransacked. As investigators race to identify the perpetrator, they uncover a diabolical plan of murder and robbery orchestrated by a trio of reckless killers.

title: Signs of a Psychopath
subTitle: Psychopaths live among us. They can be friends, family members, coworkers, or even lovers. Trying as they may to impersonate normal humans, there are always signs that reveal their true nature: calculating, narcissistic -- and sometimes, murderous.

title: Ghost Adventures
subTitle: The crew pierces the seal on California's Mira Loma Detention Center; decades of death, violence and bloodshed have scarred this massive compound, painting a thick layer of doom on every square inch and delivering some of the most solid evidence yet.

title: Ghost Adventures
subTitle: Zak and the crew check in for a night of terror at a Tucson, Arizona, hotel plagued by poltergeist activity and spirit possession. Could a brush with one of America's most violent gangsters be responsible for the darkness that inhabits the building?

title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
subTitle: Go inside prison walls to interview evil itself. Relatives of killers, along with killers themselves, tell their chilling tales. Questions these killers have never been asked before result in powerful, unsettling and contentious encounters.

title: The Murder Tapes
subTitle: A woman makes a frantic 911 call, saying her neighbour is not breathing and covered in blood; police find 69-year-old Benjamin dead, his house in disarray and money missing; as detectives search for answers, another murder shakes the community.
